name: quote0-desktop
description: Quote/0 desktop control app: flash firmware, push framebuffers, configure text/image/compose layouts. Next.js + TypeScript renderer packaged in Electron.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n next,electron -c blue,yellow "npm run dev:renderer" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron ."
scripts.package:mac-arm64: npm run build && electron-packager . Quote0 --overwrite --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=dist --extra-resource=../.release/firmware-resources --asar --prune=true --ignore="^/renderer$" --ignore="^/\.next$" && codesign --deep --force --sign - dist/Quote0-darwin-arm64/Quote0.app && npm run dmg:mac-arm64
scripts.package:mac-x64: npm run build && electron-packager . Quote0 --overwrite --platform=darwin --arch=x64 --out=dist --extra-resource=../.release/firmware-resources --asar --prune=true --ignore="^/renderer$" --ignore="^/\.next$" && codesign --deep --force --sign - dist/Quote0-darwin-x64/Quote0.app && npm run dmg:mac-x64
scripts.dmg:mac-arm64: rm -rf dist/_dmg_arm64 && mkdir -p dist/_dmg_arm64 && electron-installer-dmg dist/Quote0-darwin-arm64/Quote0.app Quote0 --out=dist/_dmg_arm64 --title="Quote/0 Desktop" --overwrite && mv dist/_dmg_arm64/Quote0.dmg dist/Quote0-darwin-arm64.dmg && rmdir dist/_dmg_arm64
scripts.dmg:mac-x64: rm -rf dist/_dmg_x64 && mkdir -p dist/_dmg_x64 && electron-installer-dmg dist/Quote0-darwin-x64/Quote0.app Quote0 --out=dist/_dmg_x64 --title="Quote/0 Desktop" --overwrite && mv dist/_dmg_x64/Quote0.dmg dist/Quote0-darwin-x64.dmg && rmdir dist/_dmg_x64

author: stvlynn
